meaning: n.关厂,关店,停业,被关在外面的人,使对方无法得分的比赛
examples: The financial crisis also push our noshery to the edge of shutout .
Sure, as I said, it would have been nice to have Wang get the shutout.
Ariel Harush recorded the shutout for No. 59 Israel, which is second in Europe Group F.
Gast (1-0) tossed five shutout innings before giving up four runs in the sixth.
